Volume/Strength Proxy (No Real Volume): Large bullish candle body closing above EMA

Supertrend green + price above = continuation; flip to red = potential exit/reversal
Volume/Strength Proxy (No Real Volume): Large candle closing decisively beyond Supertrend line

Strongest A+ Confluence Signals (Need ≥3: ADX > 35 and rising = very strong trend; ADX > 40 = continuation highly likely
In uptrend: RSI 40–55 on pullback (buy zone); >70 overbought (caution); divergence = reversal warning
Squeeze → sudden expansion + close outside band = breakout; touch lower band in uptrend = pullback
Volume/Strength Proxy (No Real Volume): BB width expansion + large directional candle

Strongest A+ Confluence Signals (Need ≥3: MACD line above signal + histogram expanding = bullish momentum; divergence = weakening trend/reversal
CCI > +100 = overbought (sell in range); < –100 = oversold (buy in range); divergence = reversal signal
